## Summary

Describe the behavior or documentation change.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `npm test`.
- [ ] I added or updated an eval case for behavior changes.
- [ ] I used only synthetic examples.
- [ ] I checked that no personal data, credentials, private paths, or confidential information are included.
- [ ] I did not add a runtime, network dependency, connector, MCP server, hook, telemetry, or persistence layer.
